caption: A person's hand holds a clear protective sleeve over a sports trading card resting on a black "OBSIDIAN" box. The card is inside a top-loader, and the box displays the text "2 AUTOGRAPPHS!". The scene is set against a red and black patterned surface featuring the "JASPYS" logo and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM". In the background, a man wearing a black shirt is visible in a small inset window, appearing to be in a room with shelving and equipment. As the sequence progresses, the hand moves the protective sleeve across the card. The layout fluctuates between a close-up view of the card and the broader scene featuring the man in the inset, alternating the focus of the display while maintaining the same physical environment and objects.
